description_long: This object is a stylized humanoid figure dressed in full military combat gear, featuring a digital camouflage uniform in shades of green and gray. The figure wears a tactical vest with multiple pouches and utility attachments on the front, and a helmet with a digital camo pattern and integrated green-tinted goggles. The arms and legs are blocky, with the uniform pattern continuing seamlessly across the limbs, and the boots are tan with visible tread details. On the left arm, there is a rectangular patch with a flag insignia, while the right arm has a blank patch area. The back of the vest displays a bold, dark pattern resembling utility straps or belts. The overall appearance is that of a modern infantry soldier, designed for urban or tactical scenarios.
description: A blocky, camouflaged soldier figure with a tactical vest, helmet, and green-tinted goggles, featuring military insignia and utility details.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the tactical vest with a dark utility strap pattern and the digital camouflage uniform.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the helmet profile, green-tinted goggles, and a flag insignia patch on the upper arm.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the tactical vest with pouches, green-tinted goggles, facial hair, and detailed boots.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the helmet, blank arm patch, and the side profile of the uniform and boots.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Digital camouflage pattern in green and gray tones, covering the uniform and helmet.
attribute_military_markings: Flag insignia patch on the left upper arm; no other visible markings.
